label: Cold War History
app_prompts: Cold War timeline explorer: user picks a year 1945–1991 and sees what was happening on both sides — US and Soviet key decisions, proxy conflicts, cultural moments. Include détente, Cuban Missile Crisis, Sino-Soviet split.

Declassified document analyzer: user pastes text from an NSC memo, FRUS document, or declassified CIA report and gets historical context — what was happening, who wrote it, what vocabulary signals the era.

Cold War historiography comparison: user selects two historical interpretations (orthodox vs. revisionist vs. post-revisionist) and sees how each frames the same event — containment, Korean War, détente.
Proxy war mapper: user picks a Cold War conflict (Korea, Vietnam, Angola, Afghanistan) and traces the superpower rivalry underneath — military aid, covert operations, diplomatic maneuvering.
Nuclear deterrence explainer: user explores deterrence concepts — MAD, first strike, second strike, escalation dominance — through historical crises where these doctrines were actually tested.
